name: Executables Started in Suspicious Folder
description: Detects the execution of executable files (EXEs) from directories commonly used by malware for temporary storage or as drop locations. This indicates potential malware activity.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Process Creation (1).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the executable that was launched.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the executable file, indicating a suspicious directory.

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that launched the executable.

parameters.name: parent_process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the executable was launched.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute the process.
